race.description: Lovey's Grocers Iga Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: A few first starters will attract interest but the safe option is to go with the exposed form of POMELO CHAMOMILE (6) who is back from a 15-week spell. Settled near the speed and kept finding to hold on for third over this course and distance at his only appearance. Recent trial winner who looks set to come back bigger and better this time in work. Peter Snowden pitched HELLDEEVA (4) into the Listed Lonhro Plate on debut three weeks and she wasn't up to the task. Huge difference in race quality today so her 6.5 length defeat may measure up okay. First starter POTOMAC RIVER (7) is by Pride Of Dubai from a Foxwedge mare who has produced four winners from four foals. Went well in a recent Beaumont trial so a bright start to her career is on the cards. Home Affairs filly SPRIGHTLY AFFAIR (8) looks ready to make an impact on debut following a sound trial win at the Beaumont track on 12 February. SCRAP (2) is trialling well for Kim Waugh and can make his presence felt on debut.
